name: Plasson Industries Ltd
summary: Plasson Industries Ltd provides various solutions for connecting PE pipes worldwide. It offers electrofusion fittings, adjustable elbows, mechanical fittings, wastewater systems, PE ball valves, controllers, excess flow valves, geothermal systems, and large diameter electrofusion couplers, as well as fittings for polyethylene pipe systems. The company also offers a range of bathroom and kitchen products, such as bida seats, faucets, bathroom accessories, bath sinks, drainage channels, toilets and toilet seats, and rinsing tanks, as well as spare parts for plasaun products. It provides various systems for the controlled supply of potable water, automatic feeding, and climate control for poultry and livestock, including broilers, turkeys, breeders, layers, and swine, as well as offers professional solutions. In addition, the company offers Quality Point Management (QPM) that enables organizations to drive a pro-active quality management approach in infrastructure projects & maintenance. Its products are used in municipal water distribution, gas conveyance, industrial fluids transfer, wastewater systems, communication, mines and agriculture. The company was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Menashe, Israel.
